context_text: <A> well see our this when you live uh in florida in a retirement community they're all displaced northerners / <B> okay / <A> so generally all of our families are still up north / <B> okay / <A> and that's a good bonding when when holidays come and { uh } / <B> [ jeez ] / <A> everybody gets together because most of us aren't with our family so / <B> okay / <A> our friends down here become an extension of your family { just } / <B> [ okay ] / <A> because family is always so far away / <B> okay / <A> almost everybody that retires here is from up north in cold weather / <B> okay
